title: She Got Game: The Movie
overview: The first doc-movie about women's basketball world and its protagonists, touching topics as combination of sport and femininity, the economic crisis of clubs, the 'homosexuality, the professionalism sports for women. The director Silvia Gottardi meets the strongest players of the basketball scene and the champions of the past, as well as basketball star USA, coaches, presidents and main personalities of other sports, in order to give a look on women's basketball.
